statement: In every magma, Equation 529 (`x = y * (y * (z * (z * y)))`) implies Equation 1728 (`x = (y * y) * ((y * x) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0955
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op z (op z y))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op y x) x))
